_description: ECC hook templates for Android projects. Copy the relevant hooks object into your project's .claude/settings.json

PostToolUse._comment: Run Detekt/Lint after every file edit
Sync Gradle after editing libs.versions.toml or build.gradle.kts

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT" | grep -q 'libs.versions.toml\|build.gradle.kts'; then ./gradlew build --dry-run 2>&1 | head -20; fi

PreToolUse._comment: Block hardcoded secrets from being written

hooks.command: echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -E '(API_KEY|SECRET|PASSWORD|TOKEN)\s*=\s*["\x27][^$\{]' && echo 'ERROR: Potential secret detected' && exit 1 || exit 0

PreToolUse._comment: Block SharedPreferences usage for sensitive data

hooks.command: echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -E 'SharedPreferences.*[Tt]oken|SharedPreferences.*[Pp]assword' && echo 'ERROR: Use EncryptedSharedPreferences for tokens, not SharedPreferences' && exit 1 || exit 0

Stop._comment: Remind to run verification loop at session end

hooks.command:
echo '
=== Android Verification Reminder ===
Run before committing:
  1. ./gradlew detekt ktlintCheck
  2. ./gradlew testDebugUnitTest
  3. maestro test .maestro/
===================================='
